ऐि榉सस ब犉क तथा एचडीएफसी ब犉क िलिमटेड को रा瀠灩ीय बचत साविध जमा िनयम, 1981 के अधीन राजप灴 म犆 इसके 灹काशन क琉 तारीख से अिभदान 灹ा瀉त करने के िलए 灹ािधकृत करती है। 2. इस अिधसूचना के तहत 灹ािधकार िन瀓निलिखत शत猀 के अ瀇यधीन है, अथा榁त- (i) अ瀖प बचत 瀡क琉म犘 के 灹चालन और लेखाकरण के िलए 灹瀄येक 瀡क琉म के िविन琖द榁瀠ट कृ瀄यकारी सिहत ब犉क म犆 सम琔प榁त सॉ瀐टवेयर हो; (ii) ब犉क सभी शाखा猒 म犆 ऑनलाइन 灹चालन犘 के मा瀇यम से इस 瀡क琉म को 灹बंध कर सक犆गे जो पया榁瀉त सुर楹ा जांच के अ瀇यधीन कोर ब犉ककारी सो瀖युशन (सीबीएस) पर है। शाखाएं िज瀈ह犆 रा瀠灩ीय बचत साविध जमा 瀡क琉म सीबीएस 瀉लेटफाम榁 म犆 灹चालन कर सक犆गे। (iii) सभी िव灹ेषण भारतीय 琇रजव榁 ब犉क के क犆灶ीय लेखा अनुभाग, नागपुर म犆, सरकारी खाते म犆 कोर ब犉ककारी सो瀖युशन शाखा猒 के मामले म犆 एक 琈दन के भीतर और गैर कोर ब犉ककारी सो瀖युशन शाखा猒 के मामले म犆 तीन 琈दन犘 के भीतर जमा 琈कए जाएंगे, िव灹ेषण म犆 िवलंब होने पर तीस 琈दन तक िवलंब के मामले म犆 ब犉क जमाकता榁 को भुगतान यो榑य 瀑याज दर और 0.5% के बराबर और तीस 琈दन से अिधक िवलंब होने के मामले म犆 और 1% क琉 शाि瀡त का भुगतान करेगा; (iv) ब犉क शाखा猒 क琉 सूची अि灡म म犆 घोषणा कर犆गे जो इस 瀡क琉म म犆 灹चालन नह牷 कर犆गे; -- 1 of 17 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART I—SEC. 1] (v) ब犉क क琉 कोई सीबीएस शाखाएं इस 瀡क琉म 灹चालन से अपव琔ज榁त होती ह犉, ऐसा ब犉क इस बारे म犆 िव瀄त मं灴ालय को स瀓यक अिधका琇रता 灹दान करेगा; (vi) 瀡क琉म उपाबंध犘 के अनुसार रा瀠灩ीय बचत साविध जमा 瀡क琉म 灹चालन के िलए ब犉क असफल हो जाने पर उ瀆भूत 琈कसी धनीय दािय瀄व 瀡क琉म 灹चालन के िलए अ灹ािधकृत होने हेतु दायी के अित琇र榉त ,ब犉क उसी वहन के िलए दायी होगा; (vii) इन िनबंधन犘 और शत猀 के आधार पर 琈कसी ब犉क से शो瀇य होने पर शाि瀡तय犘 सिहत 琈कसी रकम के मामले म犆, क犆灶 सरकार उस रािश को ब犉क से वसूल करेगी; (viii) ब犉क, इस 瀡क琉म के 灹चालन से संबंिधत िव瀄त मं灴ालय को आविधक 琇रपोट犇 灹瀡तुत कर犆गे। 瀡प 瀡प 瀡प 瀡प瀠टी 瀠टी 瀠टी 瀠टीकरण: करण: करण: करण:- इस अिधसूचना के 灹योजन के िलए पद पि瀑लक से榉टर के ब犉क'' का वही अथ榁 होगा जैसा琈क आय कर अिधिनयम, 1961 (1961 का 43) क琉 धारा 10 के खंड (23घ) म犆 琈दए गए 瀡प瀠टीकरण समनुदेिशत 琈कया गया है। [फा.सं. 7/10/2014-एनएस] 灹शांत गोयल, संयु榉त सिचव 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉पणी: णी: णी: णी: मूल िनयम सा.का.िन. 664 (अ) तारीख 17 琈दसंबर, 1981 獧ारा 灹कािशत 琈कए गए थे और त瀄प瀙चात सा.का.िन 300(अ), तारीख 1 अ灹ैल, 1982, सा.का.िन 257(अ), तारीख 11 माच榁, 1983, सा.का.िन 502(अ), तारीख 9 जुलाई,1984, सा.का.िन 418(अ), तारीख 10 मई, 1985, सा.का.िन 193(अ), तारीख 12 फरवरी, 1986, सा.का.िन 362(अ), तारीख 1 अ灹ैल, 1987, सा.का.िन 1005(अ), तारीख 23 琈दसंबर, 1987, सा.का.िन 353(अ), तारीख 18 माच榁, 1988, सा.का.िन 507(अ), तारीख 23 मई, 1990, सा.का.िन 191(अ), तारीख 27 माच榁, 1991, सा.का.िन 580(अ), तारीख 12 िसतंबर, 1991, सा.का.िन 727(अ), तारीख 6 琈दसंबर, 1991, सा.का.िन 431(अ), तारीख 24 अ灹ैल, 1992 सा.का.िन 586(अ), तारीख 2 िसतंबर, 1993, सा.का.िन 118(अ), तारीख 8 माच榁, 1995, सा.का.िन 5(अ), तारीख 1 जनवरी, 1999, सा.का.िन 34(अ), तारीख 15 जनवरी, 2000, सा.का.िन 151(अ), तारीख 1 माच榁, 2001, सा.का.िन 159(अ), तारीख 1 माच榁, 2002, सा.का.िन 174(अ), तारीख 1 माच榁, 2003, सा.का.िन 589(अ), तारीख 25 जुलाई, 2003, सा.का.िन 286(अ), तारीख 13 मई, 2005, सा.का.िन 479(अ), तारीख 26 जून, 2008, सा.का.िन 742(अ), तारीख 4 अ榉तूबर, 2011, सा.का.िन 846(अ), तारीख 25 नवंबर,2011, सा.का.िन 323(अ), तारीख 25 अ灹ैल, 2012, सा.का.िन 400(अ), तारीख 25 जून, 2013, सा.का.िन 222(अ), तारीख 13 माच榁, 2014, सा.का.िन 490(अ), तारीख 11 जुलाई, 2014, सा.का.िन 356(अ), तारीख 29 माच榁, 2016, सा.का.िन 941(अ), तारीख 30 िसतंबर, 2016, सा.का.िन 51(अ), तारीख 18 जनवरी, 2017, सा.का.िन 385(अ), तारीख 31 माच榁, 2017 獧ारा संशोिधत 琈कए गए थे । MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Economic Affairs) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 10th October, 2017 F. No. 7/10/2014-NS.– In pursuance of clause (ae) of rule 2 read with sub-rule (3) of rule 4 of the National Savings Time Deposit Rules, 1981, the Central Government hereby authorises all public sector banks and ICICI Bank, Axis Bank and HDFC Bank Ltd. to receive subscriptions under the National Savings Time Deposit Scheme, 1981 (herein referred to as the said Scheme), with effect from the date of publication in the Official Gazette. 2. The authorisation under this notification is subject to the following conditions, namely:- (i) there is dedicated software in the bank for operation and accounting of small savings schemes with specific functionality for each scheme; -- 2 of 17 -- ¹Hkkx Iμ[k.M 1º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 (ii) the bank may manage the deposit of subscription in accordance with the said Scheme, through on-line operations in all branches that are on Core Banking Solution, subject to adequate security checks and the branches that are not on Core Banking Solution may operate deposit of subscription under the said Scheme, manually; (iii) all remittances shall be credited to the Government Account at the Reserve Bank of India, Central Accounts Section, Nagpur within one day in case of Core Banking Solution branches and three days in case of non-Core Banking Solution branches; (iv) in case of delay in remittances beyond the period in clause (iii), the Bank shall pay a penalty equal to the rate of interest payable to the depositor plus 0.5% in case of delays upto thirty days, and 1% in case of delays beyond thirty days; (v) the Bank shall, subject to the reasonable justification furnished to the Central Government, declare in advance the list of branches that shall not accept deposits of subscription under the said Scheme; (vi) in case of any pecuniary liability arising from the failure of the Bank to perform in accordance with the provisions of the said Scheme, the Bank shall be liable to bear the liability, in addition to being liable to be de-authorised to operate small savings schemes; (vii) in case of any amount including penalties, becoming due from any Bank under these terms and conditions, the Central Government shall realize the amount from the Bank; (viii) every Bank shall submit periodic reports to the Central Government concerning the deposits of subscription and withdrawals etc. under the said Scheme. Explanation.- For the purpose of this notification, the expression “public sector bank” shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in the explanation to clause (23D) of section 10 of the Income-tax Act, 1961 (43 of 1961). [F. No. 7/10/2014-NS] PRASHANT GOYAL, Jt. Secy. (ii) ब犉क सभी शाखा猒 म犆 ऑनलाइन 灹चालन犘 के मा瀇यम से इस 瀡क琉म को 灹बंध कर सक犆गे जो पया榁瀉त सुर楹ा जांच के अ瀇यधीन कोर ब犉ककारी सो瀖युशन (सीबीएस) पर है। शाखाएं, िज瀈ह犆 शाखा猒 म犆 कोर ब犉ककाकरी सो瀖युशन (सीबीएस) नह牷 है वह रा瀠灩ीय बचत (मािसक आय खाता 瀡क琉म ह瀡तिलिखत 牲प से 灹चालन कर सक犆गे। (iii) सभी िव灹ेषण भारतीय 琇रजव榁 ब犉क के सरकारी लेखा अनुभाग, नागपुर म犆, सरकारी खाते म犆 कोर ब犉ककारी सो瀖युशन शाखा猒 के मामले म犆 एक 琈दन के भीतर और गैर कोर ब犉ककारी सो瀖युशन शाखा猒 के मामले म犆 तीन 琈दन犘 के भीतर जमा 琈कए जाएंगे; No. 7/10/2014-NS.– In pursuance of clause (ba) of rule 2 read with rule 4 of the National Savings (Monthly Income Account) Rules, 1987, the Central Government hereby authorises all public sector banks and ICICI Bank, Axis Bank and HDFC Bank Ltd. to receive subscription, under the National Savings (Monthly Income Account) Scheme, 1987 (herein referred to as the said Scheme), with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette. 2. The authorisation under this notification is subject to the following conditions, namely:- (i) there is dedicated software in the bank for operation and accounting of small savings schemes with specific functionality for each scheme; (ii) the bank may manage the deposit of subscription in accordance with the said Scheme, through on-line operations in all branches that are on Core Banking Solution, subject to adequate security checks and the branches that are not on Core Banking Solution may operate deposit of subscription under the said Scheme, manually; (iii) all remittances shall be credited to the Government Account at the Reserve Bank of India, Central Accounts Section, Nagpur within one day in case of Core Banking Solution branches and three days in case of non-Core Banking Solution branches; (iv) in case of delay in remittances beyond the period in clause (iii), the Bank shall pay a penalty equal to the rate of interest payable to the depositor plus 0.5% in case of delays upto thirty days, and 1% in case of delays beyond thirty days; (v) the Bank shall, subject to the reasonable justification furnished to the Central Government, declare in advance the list of branches that shall not accept deposits of subscription under the said Scheme; (vi) in case of any pecuniary liability arising from the failure of the Bank to perform in accordance with the provisions of the said Scheme, the Bank shall be liable to bear the liability, in addition to being liable to be de-authorised to operate small savings schemes; (vii) in case of any amount including penalties, becoming due from any Bank under these terms and conditions, the Central Government shall realize the amount from the Bank; (viii) every Bank shall submit periodic reports to the Central Government concerning the deposits of subscription and withdrawals etc. under the said Scheme. Explanation.- For the purpose of this notification, the expression “public sector bank” shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in the explanation to clause (23D) of section 10 of the Income-tax Act, 1961 (43 of 1961). No. 7/10/2014-NS.—In pursuance of clause (ia) of rule 2 read with rule 6 of the National Savings Certificates (VIII Issue) Rules, 1989, the Central Government hereby authorises all public sector banks and ICICI Bank, Axis Bank and HDFC Bank Ltd. to receive subscriptions under the National Savings Certificates (VIII Issue) Scheme, 1989 (herein referred to as the said Scheme), with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette. 2. The authorisation under this notification is subject to the following conditions, namely:- (i) there is dedicated software in the bank for operation and accounting of small savings schemes with specific functionality for each scheme; (ii) the bank may manage the deposit of subscription in accordance with the said Scheme, through on-line operations in all branches that are on Core Banking Solution, subject to adequate security checks and the branches that are not on Core Banking Solution may operate deposit of subscription under the said Scheme, manually; (iii) all remittances shall be credited to the Government Account at the Reserve Bank of India, Central Accounts Section, Nagpur within one day in case of Core Banking Solution branches and three days in case of non-Core Banking Solution branches; (iv) in case of delay in remittances beyond the period in clause (iii), the Bank shall pay a penalty equal to the rate of interest payable to the depositor plus 0.5% in case of delays upto thirty days, and 1% in case of delays beyond thirty days; (v) the Bank shall, subject to the reasonable justification furnished to the Central Government, declare in advance the list of branches that shall not accept deposits of subscription under the said Scheme; -- 9 of 17 -- 10 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART I—SEC. 1] (vi) in case of any pecuniary liability arising from the failure of the Bank to perform in accordance with the provisions of the said Scheme, the Bank shall be liable to bear the liability, in addition to being liable to be de-authorised to operate small savings schemes; (vii) in case of any amount including penalties, becoming due from any Bank under these terms and conditions, the Central Government shall realize the amount from the Bank; (viii) every Bank shall submit periodic reports to the Central Government concerning the deposits of subscription and withdrawals etc. under the said Scheme. Explanation.- For the purpose of this notification, the expression “public sector bank” shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in the explanation to clause (23D) of section 10 of the Income-tax Act, 1961 (43 of 1961). No. 7/10/2014-NS.– In pursuance of sub-clause (ii) of clause (e) of rule 2 of the Senior Citizen Savings Scheme Rules, 2004, the Central Government hereby authorises all public sector banks and ICICI Bank, Axis Bank and HDFC Bank Ltd. to receive subscriptions under the Senior Citizen Savings Scheme Rules, 2004 (herein referred to as the said Scheme), with effect from the date of the notification in the Official Gazette. 2. The authorisation under this notification is subject to the following conditions, namely:- (i) there is dedicated software in the bank for operation and accounting of small savings schemes with specific functionality for each scheme; (ii) the bank may manage the deposit of subscription in accordance with the said Scheme, through on-line operations in all branches that are on Core Banking Solution, subject to adequate security checks and the branches that are not on Core Banking Solution may operate deposit of subscription under the said Scheme, manually; (iii) all remittances shall be credited to the Government Account at the Reserve Bank of India, Central Accounts Section, Nagpur within one day in case of Core Banking Solution branches and three days in case of non-Core Banking Solution branches; (iv) in case of delay in remittances beyond the period in clause (iii), the Bank shall pay a penalty equal to the rate of interest payable to the depositor plus 0.5% in case of delays upto thirty days, and 1% in case of delays beyond thirty days; (v) the Bank shall, subject to the reasonable justification furnished to the Central Government, declare in advance the list of branches that shall not accept deposits of subscription under the said Scheme; (vi) in case of any pecuniary liability arising from the failure of the Bank to perform in accordance with the provisions of the said Scheme, the Bank shall be liable to bear the liability, in addition to being liable to be de-authorised to operate small savings schemes; (vii) in case of any amount including penalties, becoming due from any Bank under these terms and conditions, the Central Government shall realize the amount from the Bank; (viii) every Bank shall submit periodic reports to the Central Government concerning the deposits of subscription and withdrawals etc. under the said Scheme. Explanation.- For the purpose of this notification, the expression “public sector bank” shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in the explanation to clause (23D) of section 10 of the Income-tax Act, 1961 (43 of 1961). [F. No. 7/10/2014-NS] PRASHANT GOYAL, Jt. Secy.
